content.query:
SELECT TOP (100) [ReferenceNbr]
,[Description]
,[Customer]
,[PaymentMethod]
,[ARPayment_origDocAmt]
,[PaymentDate]
,[ARPayment_tranPeriodID]
,[ClosedDate]
,[PaymentPeriod]
,[Description_2]
,[Type]
 FROM [ODS].[ERP_AR_PAYMENT]

 select Type, count(1)
 FROM [ODS].[ERP_AR_PAYMENT]
 group BY
 TYPE
 order by 2 desc
